--- title: "Comparison Report: LU/LUAD" author: "Ali Al-Timimi, PhD" format: html params: data_file: "C:/Users/drziy/OneDrive/Desktop/Ali/scientific_research_current/global-cancer-complexity/output/global_cancer/RData/comparison_data/comparison_data_lu_luad.rds" execute: eval: true --- ::: {.panel-tabset} ### LU/LUAD Overview ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Probes > - **Cancer Category:** carcinomas > - **Chip hu35ksuba**: 0 filtered probes > - **Chip hu6800**: 64 filtered probes ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/probes/lu_luad_probe_counts.png){width=1050} ::: ::: #### Summary Assessment **Overall Complexity & Entropy Assessment** | Measure | All Filtered Probes | GO MF Terms | KEGG Pathways | HALLMARK Genes | |:---|:---|:---|:---|:---| | **Complexity** | not available | strong gain (uncertain) | strong gain (uncertain) | strong loss (uncertain) | | **Shannon Entropy** | not available | no clear change (well supported) | no clear change (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | | **Spectral Entropy** | not available | no clear change (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | ::: {.callout-note} **Interpretation Guide** - **Gain** = Increased complexity from normal to tumor - **Loss** = Complexity reduction from normal to tumor - **Chaotic** = Increased entropy from normal to tumor - **Anti-Chaotic** = Entropy reduction from normal to tumor - **P-values** = All p-values unadjusted unless noted ::: ::: ### GO Biological Process Clusters ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change

No significant GO clusters found.

#### Spectral Entropy Change ⚠️ Table not available. ::: ### GO Molecular Function Terms ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change **Significant GO Molecular Function Terms (Complexity)** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/go/lu_luad_go_complexity.png){width=1050} ::: :::

::: ### Latent Geometry **Latent-space normal-versus-tumor summary** Latent-space metrics are computed from the VAE representation using samples derived from the **hu35ksuba** platform only. These quantities summarize within-class geometric structure and separation between normal and tumor states in the learned latent space. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} |Measure | Normal| Tumor| Delta| |:-------------------|------:|------:|------:| |Participation ratio | 1.931| 2.761| 0.830| |Eigenvalue entropy | 0.884| 1.319| 0.435| |Anisotropy | 0.677| 0.544| -0.133| |Radius | 21.418| 25.737| 4.319| |Centroid distance | 15.244| NA| NA| ::: ::: :::
